title: Thrite's "Hardest Mod" Modpack
body:
###  Thrite's "Hardest Mod", from [his videos "Surviving Minecraft's Hardest Mod".](https://youtu.be/O36WZogmWrY?si=9jjdVi_7shqW8tKc)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/O36WZogmWrY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 This modpack doesn't have exactly the same mods that Thrite gave in his description, but it does the same thing.

In this modpack, there are some **new things**, including :

Cold and Heat : You will have to cool and heat yourself, stay in the shade and..... Survive !
(PS: night is very cold)


### Config :
You need to **create a badland world**. To do so, go in "Create new world" > "More world options" > "World type" = single biome > badlands.

You can host this modpack [on a BisectHosting server. Starts at 2.99$.](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/aff.php?aff=6703)

If you have a bug, join the discord, accept the rules and go to Help, then send a message with your problem and ping @amilex

### Shaders :
I added a lot of [DH](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) compatible shaders from [their list](https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e?permalink_comment_id=4945506), and removed the not working and ugly ones. If you want to get the same look from Thrite's videos, use the Complementary Shaders

.

.

.

.

.

### Message to Thrite (if you ever get on this page):
Hey, I wanted to ask you before publishing the modpack but i couldn't find a way to contact you (I asked in your comments but never got an awnser), if there is anything you want me to change or delete, i will do it.
